CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_blog', false, 'GYxHGSqzDdxU2rd3mrAmRtEpzXGa6mU4JOZkUgkrPG4', 'v3.5.0--bPmpx7WOMgCWvp93ekxxSMl8JGr-kPUsjUCGIPcWiko', 'UAJ1l7qoSF7Pu5u5Dl7kaybJ-rI_GKKVYlji0d0m4OI'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_blog; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_blog (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "author" VARCHAR NULL, "body" TEXT, "categories" TEXT NULL, "date" VARCHAR, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "hidden" BOOLEAN NULL, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "thumbnail" VARCHAR NULL, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_blog VALUES ('blog/blog/gpu-architecture-notes.md', 'How the RTX 3090 Actually Works: GPU Architecture notes...', 'Anurag Kanade', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"I spent some time watching ",["a",{"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=example","rel":["nofollow"]},"Branch Education''s video"]," on how GPUs work, specifically the RTX 3090, and took detailed notes. Figured I''d clean them up and share what I learned about the ",["strong",{},"GA102 architecture"],"."],["h2",{"id":"the-hardware-breakdown"},"The Hardware Breakdown"],["p",{},"We''re looking at ",["strong",{},"GA102"],", which is the 3090''s GPU processor architecture."],["h3",{"id":"the-hierarchy"},"The Hierarchy"],["p",{},"The architecture is organized in layers:"],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"7 GPCs"]," (Graphics Processing Clusters) at the top level"]],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"GPU architecture showing the 7 GPCs","src":"https://learnopencv.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Graphics-Processing-Clusters.png"}]],["ol",{"start":2},["li",{},"Within each GPC, there are ",["strong",{},"12 SMs"]," (Streaming Multiprocessors)"]],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"Internal structure of a Streaming Multiprocessor (SM)","src":"https://learnopencv.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Streaming-Multiprocessors.png"}]],["ol",{"start":3},["li",{},"Inside each SM, there are ",["strong",{},"4 warp schedulers"]," and ",["strong",{},"1 Ray Tracing core"]],["li",{},"Inside each warp, there are ",["strong",{},"32 CUDA cores"]," (shading cores) and ",["strong",{},"1 Tensor core"]]],["h3",{"id":"total-core-count"},"Total Core Count"],["p",{},"Across the entire GPU:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"10,752"]," CUDA cores"],["li",{},["strong",{},"336"]," Tensor cores"],["li",{},["strong",{},"84"]," Ray Tracing cores"]],["h3",{"id":"around-the-edge"},"Around the Edge"],["p",{},"The chip''s periphery includes:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"12 graphics memory controllers"],["li",{},"NVLink controllers"],["li",{},"PCIe interface"],["li",{},"6MB Level 2 SRAM cache at the bottom"],["li",{},"Gigathread Engine that manages all 7 GPCs and the streaming multiprocessors inside"]],["h3",{"id":"inside-each-sm"},"Inside Each SM"],["p",{},"Each streaming multiprocessor contains:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"128KB of L1 cache/shared memory (configurable split)"]],["h2",{"id":"what-each-core-does"},"What Each Core Does"],["h3",{"id":"cuda-cores"},"CUDA Cores"],["p",{},"Can be thought of as simple binary calculators - they handle addition, multiplication, and a few other basic operations."],["h3",{"id":"tensor-cores"},"Tensor Cores"],["p",{},"Matrix multiplication and addition calculators. They''re used the most when working with geometrical transformations and neural networks."],["h3",{"id":"ray-tracing-cores"},"Ray Tracing Cores"],["p",{},"The fewest and the largest cores. They''re specially designed for ray tracing algorithms."],["h2",{"id":"key-terminologies"},"Key Terminologies"],["h3",{"id":"fma-fused-multiply-add"},"FMA (Fused Multiply-Add)"],["p",{},"The operation ",["code",{},"A × B + C"],". This is a fundamental calculation that gets used constantly in GPU operations."],["h3",{"id":"simd-single-instruction-multiple-data"},"SIMD (Single Instruction, Multiple Data)"],["p",{},"GPUs solve embarrassingly parallel problems using SIMD - applying one instruction to multiple data points simultaneously."],["h3",{"id":"simt-single-instruction-multiple-threads"},"SIMT (Single Instruction, Multiple Threads)"],["p",{},"Basically SIMD but adds a program counter, which avoids conflicts from dependency and branching of operations."],["h2",{"id":"computational-architecture-physical-hardware"},"Computational Architecture → Physical Hardware"],["p",{},"Now that we understand how SIMD/SIMT works, here''s how the computational architecture maps to the physical hardware:"],["ul",{},["li",{},"Each instruction is completed by a ",["strong",{},"thread"]],["li",{},"A ",["strong",{},"thread"]," is paired with a ",["strong",{},"CUDA core"]],["li",{},"Threads are bundled into groups of 32 called ",["strong",{},"warps"]],["li",{},"The same sequence of instructions are issued to all threads in a warp"],["li",{},["strong",{},"Warps"]," are grouped into ",["strong",{},"thread blocks"],", which are handled by a ",["strong",{},"Streaming Multiprocessor (SM)"]],["li",{},["strong",{},"Thread blocks"]," are grouped into ",["strong",{},"grids"],", which are computed across the entire GPU"]],["p",{},"All these operations are managed and scheduled by the ",["strong",{},"Gigathread Engine"],", which maps the available thread blocks to the streaming multiprocessors."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"the-hardware-breakdown","depth":2,"text":"The Hardware Breakdown","children":[{"id":"the-hierarchy","depth":3,"text":"The Hierarchy"},{"id":"total-core-count","depth":3,"text":"Total Core Count"},{"id":"around-the-edge","depth":3,"text":"Around the Edge"},{"id":"inside-each-sm","depth":3,"text":"Inside Each SM"}]},{"id":"what-each-core-does","depth":2,"text":"What Each Core Does","children":[{"id":"cuda-cores","depth":3,"text":"CUDA Cores"},{"id":"tensor-cores","depth":3,"text":"Tensor Cores"},{"id":"ray-tracing-cores","depth":3,"text":"Ray Tracing Cores"}]},{"id":"key-terminologies","depth":2,"text":"Key Terminologies","children":[{"id":"fma-fused-multiply-add","depth":3,"text":"FMA (Fused Multiply-Add)"},{"id":"simd-single-instruction-multiple-data","depth":3,"text":"SIMD (Single Instruction, Multiple Data)"},{"id":"simt-single-instruction-multiple-threads","depth":3,"text":"SIMT (Single Instruction, Multiple Threads)"}]},{"id":"computational-architecture-physical-hardware","depth":2,"text":"Computational Architecture → Physical Hardware"}]}}', '["Hardware","GPU","Computer Architecture"]', '2025-01-05', INSERT INTO _content_blog VALUES ('blog/blog/neural-audio-codec-rvq.md', 'Vector Quantization: The Mathematical Art of Audio Compression', 'Anurag Kanade', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},["em",{},"Every sound is data of millions of samples every second. Compressing all that without losing clarity has always been the challenge. Now imagine if a model could learn what truly matters in those waves and ignore the rest. That idea, called vector quantization, reshaped how modern AI handles voice and music."]],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"the-challenge-behind-modern-audio-compression"},"The Challenge Behind Modern Audio Compression"],["p",{},"Modern voice AI systems face a big challenge: every second of CD-quality audio produces about 1.4 million data points. Multiply that by millions of users, and storage and transmission quickly become expensive. Earlier compression techniques such as MP3, AAC, and Opus helped, but each involved trade offs reducing bandwidth at the cost of quality or latency."],["p",{},"A simpler idea was treating sounds as a continuous stream of data points. But what if we could represent these sounds more efficiently?"],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"Continuous vs. Discrete Signal Representation","src":"/continousvsdigital.png"}]],["p",{},["em",{},"Figure 1: Continuous vs. Discrete Signal Representation"]],["h2",{"id":"understanding-quantization"},"Understanding Quantization"],["p",{},"Before we jump into how audio uses quantization, it helps to understand what quantization means in machine learning. In Machine learning, ",["a",{"href":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quantization","rel":["nofollow"]},"quantization"]," refers to reducing the precision of numbers used to represent model parameters or activations like converting 32-bit floating points to 8-bit integers."],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"32-bit Float to 8-bit Integer Quantization","src":"/8bitint-quantization.png"}]],["p",{},["em",{},"Figure 2: 32-bit Float to 8-bit Integer Quantization"]],["blockquote",{},["p",{},["strong",{},"NOTE:"]," Quantization is different from compression. Compression reduces the size of data by encoding it more efficiently, while quantization reduces the precision of data representation."]],["p",{},"This makes models faster and lighter, but it is a win win game if we are constrained on a limited amount of compute by sacrificing a small amount of accuracy for big efficiency gains. While this approach works well for neural networks, audio data has unique properties that require a more sophisticated strategy—one that can capture the complex patterns hidden in sound waves."],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"vector-quantization-through-speech"},"Vector Quantization Through Speech"],["p",{},"Enter vector quantization, a technique that transforms high-dimensional audio data into compact representations without significant loss of quality. Vector quantization (VQ) exploits the fact that variation in natural data is redundant. When you hear someone say \"hello\", your brain doesn''t process every microscopic detail of the sound wave. Instead, it extracts key features and matches them against learned patterns."],["p",{},"Let''s break down how VQ works mathematically."],["p",{},"Given input vector x ∈ ℝⁿ, find codebook entry cᵢ that minimizes:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"d"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{},"x"],["mo",{"separator":"true"},","],["msub",{},["mi",{},"c"],["mi",{},"i"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{},"="],["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∣"],["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∣"],["mi",{},"x"],["mo",{},"−"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"c"],["mi",{},"i"]],["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∣"],["msup",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∣"],["mn",{},"2"]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"d(x, c_i) = ||x - c_i||^2"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"d"],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mpunct"]},","],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3117em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"i"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∣∣"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}],["span",{"className":["mbin"]},"−"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.0641em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3117em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"i"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∣"],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∣"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.8141em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3.063em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"2"]]]]]]]]]]]],["p",{},"Let''s say we have a 256-dimensional vector representing a short audio segment. Instead of storing all 256 values, we can use VQ to find the closest match from a learned codebook of common speech patterns."],["pre",{"className":"language-python shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark","code":"import numpy as np\n\n# Audio segment encoded as 256-dimensional vector\naudio_vector = np.array([0.23, -0.41, 0.67, -0.12, ...])  # 256 values\n\n# Learned codebook representing common speech patterns\ncodebook = np.array([\n    [0.25, -0.40, 0.65, -0.10, ...],  # maybe a fricative sound\n    [0.15, 0.32, -0.21, 0.45, ...],   # maybe a vowel sound\n    [0.67, -0.23, 0.12, 0.89, ...],   # maybe a plosive sound\n])\n\ndef quantize_vector(input_vec, codebook):\n    \"\"\"Find closest codebook match using L2 distance\"\"\"\n    distances = np.linalg.norm(codebook - input_vec, axis=1)\n    best_index = np.argmin(distances)\n    return codebook[best_index], best_index\n\nquantized_vec, index = quantize_vector(audio_vector, codebook)\n# Store index (small integer) instead of 256 floats\n","language":"python","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{},"import numpy as np\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{},"# Audio segment encoded as 256-dimensional vector\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{},"audio_vector = np.array([0.23, -0.41, 0.67, -0.12, ...])  # 256 values\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{},"# Learned codebook representing common speech patterns\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{},"codebook = np.array([\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{},"    [0.25, -0.40, 0.65, -0.10, ...],  # maybe a fricative sound\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{},"    [0.15, 0.32, -0.21, 0.45, ...],   # maybe a vowel sound\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{},"    [0.67, -0.23, 0.12, 0.89, ...],   # maybe a plosive sound\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{},"])\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{},"def quantize_vector(input_vec, codebook):\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{},"    \"\"\"Find closest codebook match using L2 distance\"\"\"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":15},["span",{},"    distances = np.linalg.norm(codebook - input_vec, axis=1)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":16},["span",{},"    best_index = np.argmin(distances)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":17},["span",{},"    return codebook[best_index], best_index\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":18},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":19},["span",{},"quantized_vec, index = quantize_vector(audio_vector, codebook)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":20},["span",{},"# Store index (small integer) instead of 256 floats\n"]]]],["p",{},"By storing just the index of the closest codebook entry, we drastically reduce the amount of data needed to represent the audio segment."],["h2",{"id":"how-the-codebook-is-learned"},"How the Codebook is Learned"],["p",{},"Traditional approaches used k-means clustering to discover representative patterns:"],["pre",{"className":"language-python shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark","code":"def learn_codebook_kmeans(training_data, k=1024):\n    # Initialize random centroids\n    centroids = np.random.randn(k, vector_dim)\n\n    for iteration in range(max_iters):\n        # Assign each vector to nearest centroid\n        assignments = []\n        for vec in training_data:\n            distances = np.linalg.norm(centroids - vec, axis=1)\n            assignments.append(np.argmin(distances))\n\n        # Update centroids as cluster means\n        for i in range(k):\n            cluster_vecs = training_data[np.array(assignments) == i]\n            if len(cluster_vecs) > 0:\n                centroids[i] = np.mean(cluster_vecs, axis=0)\n\n    return centroids\n","language":"python","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{},"def learn_codebook_kmeans(training_data, k=1024):\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{},"    # Initialize random centroids\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{},"    centroids = np.random.randn(k, vector_dim)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{},"    for iteration in range(max_iters):\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{},"        # Assign each vector to nearest centroid\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{},"        assignments = []\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{},"        for vec in training_data:\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{},"            distances = np.linalg.norm(centroids - vec, axis=1)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{},"            assignments.append(np.argmin(distances))\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{},"        # Update centroids as cluster means\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{},"        for i in range(k):\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{},"            cluster_vecs = training_data[np.array(assignments) == i]\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":15},["span",{},"            if len(cluster_vecs) > 0:\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":16},["span",{},"                centroids[i] = np.mean(cluster_vecs, axis=0)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":17},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":18},["span",{},"    return centroids\n"]]]],["p",{},"Newer codecs use more sophisticated methods like VQ-VAE to jointly learn the codebook and the encoder-decoder architecture."],["p",{},["em",{},"This worked for offline processing but had serious limitations for neural network training. The discrete assignment steps and batch processing requirements made gradient-based optimization difficult."]],["h2",{"id":"limitations-of-traditional-vector-quantization"},"Limitations of Traditional Vector Quantization"],["p",{},"Let the input be a feature vector ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"∈"],["msup",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"double-struck"},"R"],["mi",{},"d"]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\mathbf{x} \\in \\mathbb{R}^d"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.5782em;vertical-align:-0.0391em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"∈"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.8491em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbb"]},"R"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.8491em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3.063em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"d"]]]]]]]]]]]," and a finite codebook ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"script"},"C"],["mo",{},"="],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"{"],["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mn",{},"1"]],["mo",{"separator":"true"},","],["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mn",{},"2"]],["mo",{"separator":"true"},","],["mo",{},"…"],["mo",{"separator":"true"},","],["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mi",{},"K"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"}"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\mathcal{C} = \\lbrace \\mathbf{c}_1, \\mathbf{c}_2, \\dots, \\mathbf{c}_K \\rbrace"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6833em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathcal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0583em;"},"C"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"{"],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3011em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"1"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mpunct"]},","],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3011em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"2"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mpunct"]},","],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["minner"]},"…"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mpunct"]},","],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3283em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"],"style":"margin-right:0.0715em;"},"K"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},"}"]]]],".\nVector quantization replaces each input with its nearest codeword:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"Q"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{},"="],["mi",{},"arg"],["mo",{},"⁡"],["msub",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"min"],["mo",{},"⁡"]],["mrow",{},["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mi",{},"k"]],["mo",{},"∈"],["mi",{"mathvariant":"script"},"C"]]],["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∥"],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"−"],["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mi",{},"k"]],["msubsup",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∥"],["mn",{},"2"],["mn",{},"2"]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"Q(\\mathbf{x}) = \\arg\\min_{\\mathbf{c}_k \\in \\mathcal{C}} \\|\\mathbf{x} - \\mathbf{c}_k\\|_2^2"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"Q"],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.0059em;vertical-align:-0.2559em;"}],["span",{"className":["mop"]},"ar",["span",{"style":"margin-right:0.0139em;"},"g"]],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mop"]},["span",{"className":["mop"]},"min"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3283em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf","mtight"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3448em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.3488em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.0714em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.5em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size3","size1","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"],"style":"margin-right:0.0315em;"},"k"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.1512em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mrel","mtight"]},"∈"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathcal","mtight"],"style":"margin-right:0.0583em;"},"C"]]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.2559em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∥"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}],["span",{"className":["mbin"]},"−"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.0641em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3361em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"],"style":"margin-right:0.0315em;"},"k"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∥"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.8141em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.4519em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"2"]]],["span",{"style":"top:-3.063em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"2"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.2481em;"},["span",{}]]]]]]]]]],["p",{},"The expected distortion (error) is:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"D"],["mo",{},"="],["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"double-struck"},"E"],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"]],["mrow",{},["mo",{"fence":"true"},"["],["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∥"],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"−"],["mi",{},"Q"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["msubsup",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"∥"],["mn",{},"2"],["mn",{},"2"]],["mo",{"fence":"true"},"]"]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"D = \\mathbb{E}_{\\mathbf{x}}\\left[\\|\\mathbf{x} - Q(\\mathbf{x})\\|_2^2\\right]"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6833em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0278em;"},"D"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.2em;vertical-align:-0.35em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbb"]},"E"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.1611em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf","mtight"]},"x"]]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["minner"]},["span",{"className":["mopen","delimcenter"],"style":"top:0em;"},["span",{"className":["delimsizing","size1"]},"["]],["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∥"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}],["span",{"className":["mbin"]},"−"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"Q"],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"∥"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t Limitations"],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Limited expressiveness"]," — A single codeword per region can''t capture complex or multimodal distributions in ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"p"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"p(\\mathbf{x})"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"p"],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"]]]],"."],["li",{},["strong",{},"Codebook growth problem"]," — To halve distortion, you often need to ",["em",{},"square"]," the number of codewords: ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"D"],["mo",{},"∝"],["msup",{},["mi",{},"K"],["mrow",{},["mo",{},"−"],["mn",{},"2"],["mi",{"mathvariant":"normal"},"/"],["mi",{},"d"]]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"D \\propto K^{-2/d}"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6833em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0278em;"},"D"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"∝"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.888em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0715em;"},"K"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.888em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3.063em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"−"],["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"2/"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"d"]]]]]]]]]]]],". Larger ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"K"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"K"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6833em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0715em;"},"K"]]]]," implies exponential memory and compute."],["li",{},["strong",{},"High encoding cost"]," — Nearest-neighbor search costs ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"O"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{},"K"],["mi",{},"d"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"O(Kd)"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0278em;"},"O"],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0715em;"},"K"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"d"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"]]]]," for each vector."],["li",{},["strong",{},"No residual correction"]," — Once quantized, the residual ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"e"],["mo",{},"="],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"−"],["mi",{},"Q"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\mathbf{e} = \\mathbf{x} - Q(\\mathbf{x})"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.4444em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"e"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6667em;vertical-align:-0.0833em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}],["span",{"className":["mbin"]},"−"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"Q"],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"]]]]," is discarded, wasting useful fine-grained detail."],["li",{},["strong",{},"Uniform distortion metric"]," — Standard L2 distance treats all dimensions equally."]],["hr",{}],["blockquote",{},["p",{},"Classic VQ minimizes distortion but scales poorly with dimension and distribution complexity — this motivates techniques like Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) to address these limitations."]],["h2",{"id":"residual-vector-quantization"},"Residual Vector Quantization"],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) Architecture","src":"https://notesbylex.com/_media/rvq.png"}]],["p",{},["em",{},"Figure 3: Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) Architecture"]],["p",{},"Residual Vector Quantization fundamentally changed the game by stacking multiple quantizers, where each stage learns to encode the error left behind by the previous one."],["p",{},"The mathematical formulation of RVQ is:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"≈"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mn",{},"1"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{},"+"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mn",{},"2"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"−"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mn",{},"1"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{},"+"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mn",{},"3"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"−"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mn",{},"1"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{},"−"],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mn",{},"2"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mo",{},"+"],["mo",{},"…"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\mathbf{x} \\approx q_1(\\mathbf{x}) + q_2(\\mathbf{x} - q_1(\\mathbf{x})) + q_3(\\mathbf{x} - q_1(\\mathbf{x}) - q_2(\\mathbf{x})) + \\ldots"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.4831em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"≈"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0359em;"},"q"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3011em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:-0.0359em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"1"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.15em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}],["span",{"className":["mbin"]},"+"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2222em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0359em;"},"q"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3011em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:-0.0359em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"classNam \\in \\mathbb{R}^d"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.5782em;vertical-align:-0.0391em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"∈"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.8491em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbb"]},"R"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.8491em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3.063em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"d"]]]]]]]]]]]," ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"i"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"i"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6595em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"i"]]]]]],["p",{},"The is:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mover",{"accent":"true"},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"x"],["mo",{},"^"]],["mo",{},"="],["msubsup",{},["mo",{},"∑"],["mrow",{},["mi",{},"i"],["mo",{},"="],["mn",{},"1"]],["mi",{},"N"]],["msub",{},["mi",{},"q"],["mi",{},"i"]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["msub",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"r"],["mrow",{},["mi",{},"i"],["mo",{},"−"],["mn",{},"1"]]],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\hat{\\mathbf{x}} = \\sum_{i=1}^N q_i(\\mathbf{r}_{i-1})"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.7079em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","accent"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.7079em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:3em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"x"]],["span",{"style":"top:-3.0134em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:3em;"}],["span",{"className":["accent-body"],"style":"left:-0.25em;"},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"^"]]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.2809em;vertical-align:-0.2997em;"}],["span",{"className":["mop"]},["span",{"className":["mop","op-symbol","small-op"],"style":"position:relative;top:0em;"},"∑"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.9812em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.4003em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"i"],["span",{"className":["mrel","mtight"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"1"]]]],["span",{"style":"top:-3.2029em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"],"style":"margin-right:0.109em;"},"N"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"classNam builds the final approximation by adding up several small corrections instead of using one big codebook."],["pre",{"className":"language-python shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark","code":"def residual_quantize(input_vec, codebooks):\n    \"\"\"Multi-stage quantization with progressive refinement\"\"\"\n    reconstruction = np.zeros_like(input_vec)\n    residual = input_vec.copy()\n    indices = []\n\n    for stage, codebook in enumerate(codebooks):\n        quant_vec, idx = quantize_vector(residual, codebook)\n        reconstruction += quant_vec\n        indices.append(idx)\n        residual = input_vec - reconstruction\n        print(f\"Stage {stage+1} residual norm: {np.linalg.norm(residual):.4f}\")\n\n    return reconstruction, indices\n","language":"python","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{},"def residual_quantize(input_vec, codebooks):\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{},"    \"\"\"Multi-stage quantization with progressive refinement\"\"\"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{},"    reconstruction = np.zeros_like(input_vec)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{},"    residual = input_vec.copy()\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{},"    indices = []\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{},"    for stage, codebook in enumerate(codebooks):\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{},"        quant_vec, idx = quantize_vector(residual, codebook)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{},"        reconstruction += quant_vec\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{},"        indices.append(idx)\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{},"        residual = input_vec - reconstruction\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{},"        print(f\"Stage {stage+1} residual norm: {np.linalg.norm(residual):.4f}\")\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{},"    return reconstruction, indices\n"]]]],["h3",{"id":"audio-demonstrations"},"Audio Demonstrations"],["p",{},["strong",{},"Original Audio"]],["p",{},["audio",{"controls":true,"src":"https://assets.modelslab.com/generations/296bb1a6-d6ad-43e3-bd7d-645dcba49b6d.wav","style":"width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0;"}]],["p",{},["strong",{},"4 Codebooks Reconstruction"]],["p",{},["audio",{"controls":true,"src":"https://assets.modelslab.com/generations/bea3a3ea-024e-435b-a978-41e6f3af9af4.wav","style":"width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0;"}]],["p",{},["strong",{},"8 Codebooks Reconstruction"]],["p",{},["audio",{"controls":true,"src":"https://assets.modelslab.com/generations/85bdaddd-0c28-4d5a-854f-633b7b042c2a.wav","style":"width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0;"}]],["p",{},["strong",{},"16 Codebooks Reconstruction"]],["p",{},["audio",{"controls":true,"src":"https://assets.modelslab.com/generations/72a29fcf-79ab-4dea-a4c6-53b7f3d21cd4.wav","style":"width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0;"}]],["p",{},["strong",{},"32 Codebooks Reconstruction"]],["p",{},["audio",{"controls":true,"src":"https://assets.modelslab.com/generations/3ec7e80d-1d18-449e-ba84-0b75034a36a6.wav","style":"width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0;"}]],["h2",{"id":"bitrate-control-through-rvq"},"Bitrate Control Through RVQ"],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"RVQ in EnCodec - Bitrate Control","src":"/rvq-in-encodec.png"}]],["p",{},["em",{},"Figure 4: RVQ in EnCodec — Bitrate Control Through Multiple Quantization Stages"]],["p",{},"One of the biggest advantages of RVQ is fine-grained control over bitrate. By adjusting the number of quantization stages or the size of each codebook, we can trade off quality versus compression."],["p",{},"Meta''s EnCodec paper demonstrated the practical power of this approach."],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"Meta''s EnCodec Architecture","src":"/meta-encodec-arch.png"}]],["p",{},["em",{},"Figure 5: Meta''s EnCodec Architecture"]],["p",{},"The mathematical relationship shows exponential growth in representational capacity:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mtext",{},"Total patterns"],["mo",{},"="],["msup",{},["mn",{},"2"],["mrow",{},["mi",{},"b"],["mo",{},"×"],["mi",{},"N"]]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\text{Total patterns} = 2^{b \\times N}"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.8889em;vertical-align:-0.1944em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","text"]},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"Total patterns"]],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.8491em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"2"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.8491em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3.063em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"b"],["span",{"className":["mbin","mtight"]},"×"],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"],"style":"margin-right:0.109em;"},"N"]]]]]]]]]]]]],["p",{},"where ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"b"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"b"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6944em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"b"]]]]," is bits per stage and ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"N"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"N"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6833em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.109em;"},"N"]]]]," is the number of stages."],["h2",{"id":"exponential-moving-average-ema-codebook-update"},"Exponential Moving Average (EMA) Codebook Update"],["p",{},"To stabilize training, each codeword is updated using an exponential moving average:"],["p",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["msubsup",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mi",{},"i"],["mrow",{},["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{},"t"],["mo",{},"+"],["mn",{},"1"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]]],["mo",{},"="],["mi",{},"α"],["mtext",{}," "],["msubsup",{},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"c"],["mi",{},"i"],["mrow",{},["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mi",{},"t"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]]],["mo",{},"+"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"("],["mn",{},"1"],["mo",{},"−"],["mi",{},"α"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"],["mtext",{}," "],["msub",{},["mover",{"accent":"true"},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"v"],["mo",{},"ˉ"]],["mi",{},"i"]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\mathbf{c}_i^{(t+1)} = \\alpha \\, \\mathbf{c}_i^{(t)} + (1 - \\alpha) \\, \\bar{\\mathbf{v}}_i"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.3217em;vertical-align:-0.2769em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:1.0448em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.4231em;margin-left:0em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"i"]]],["span",{"style":"top:-3.2198em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mopen","mtight"]},"("],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"t"],["span",{"className":["mbin","mtight"]},"+"],["span",{"className":["mord","mtight"]},"1"],["span",{"className":["mclose","mtight"]},")"]]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.2769em;"},["span",{}]]]]]],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"="],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1.3217em;vertical-align:-0.2769em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0037em;"},"α"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"]},"c"],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:1.0448em;"},["sp is the codeword at iteration ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"t"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"t"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6151em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"t"]]]]],["li",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["msub",{},["mover",{"accent":"true"},["mi",{"mathvariant":"bold"},"v"],["mo",{},"ˉ"]],["mi",{},"i"]]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\bar{\\mathbf{v}}_i"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.7312em;vertical-align:-0.15em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},["span",{"className":["mord","accent"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.5812em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-3em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:3em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathbf"],"style":"margin-right:0.016em;"},"v"]],["span",{"style":"top:-3.0134em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:3em;"}],["span",{"className":["accent-body"],"style":"left:-0.25em;"},["span",{"className":["mord"]},"ˉ"]]]]]]],["span",{"className":["msupsub"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-t","vlist-t2"]},["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["span",{"className":["vlist"],"style":"height:0.3117em;"},["span",{"style":"top:-2.55em;margin-left:-0.016em;margin-right:0.05em;"},["span",{"className":["pstrut"],"style":"height:2.7em;"}],["span",{"className":["sizing","reset-size6","size3","mtight"]},["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal","mtight"]},"i"]]]],["span",{"className":["vlist-s"]},"​"]],["span",{"className":["vlist-r"]},["sp is the mean of all encoder outputs assigned to codeword ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"i"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"i"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.6595em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"]},"i"]]]]],["li",{},["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"α"],["mo",{},"∈"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},"["],["mn",{},"0"],["mo",{"separator":"true"},","],["mn",{},"1"],["mo",{"stretchy":"false"},")"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\alpha \\in [0, 1)"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.5782em;vertical-align:-0.0391em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0037em;"},"α"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}],["span",{"className":["mrel"]},"∈"],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.2778em;"}]],["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:1em;vertical-align:-0.25em;"}],["span",{"className":["mopen"]},"["],["span",{"className":["mord"]},"0"],["span",{"className":["mpunct"]},","],["span",{"className":["mspace"],"style":"margin-right:0.1667em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord"]},"1"],["span",{"className":["mclose"]},")"]]]]," is the momentum parameter (typically 0.99)"]],["p",{},"A higher ",["span",{"className":["katex"]},["span",{"className":["katex-mathml"]},["math",{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"},["semantics",{},["mrow",{},["mi",{},"α"]],["annotation",{"encoding":"application/x-tex"},"\\alpha"]]]],["span",{"className":["katex-html"],"ariaHidden":"true"},["span",{"className":["base"]},["span",{"className":["strut"],"style":"height:0.4306em;"}],["span",{"className":["mord","mathnormal"],"style":"margin-right:0.0037em;"},"α"]]]]," means slower, smoother updates; lower values adapt faster but can be noisy. This EMA rule helps the codebook evolve continuously, reducing abrupt jumps and preventing codeword collapse."],["hr",{}],["h2",{"id":"references"},"References"],["ol",{},["li",{},["strong",{},"Défossez, A., Copet, J., Synnaeve, G., & Adi, Y."]," (2022).
